nasb.text: After the uproar had ceased, Paul sent for the disciples, and when he had exhorted them and taken his leave of them, he left to go to Macedonia.

esv.text: After the uproar ceased, Paul sent for the disciples, and after encouraging them, he said farewell and departed for Macedonia.

cnv.text: 騷亂平息以後，保羅派人把門徒請了來，勸勉一番，就辭別起行，往馬其頓去。

ccb.text: 这场风波平息后，保罗召集众门徒勉励一番后，便辞别他们去了马其顿。

csbs.text: 骚乱平息以后，保罗请门徒们来，鼓励一番，然后与他们告别，就出发往马其顿省去了。
